title: Selling PDF Guides Without Gumroad: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or any other country with restrictions on PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip, you're stuck selling PDF guides without access to these popular platforms. This means losing out on sales, frustrated customers, and a secure way to get paid. You need an alternative that works, one that lets you focus on creating, not navigating complex payment systems. That's where Unchained Commerce comes in – a solution built for creators like you who need a PayPal-free zone to sell digital products.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad and Payhip are payment processors that help creators sell digital products directly to customers. They charge a commission on each sale and require creators to set up a store, upload products, and manage customer relationships. In contrast, Unchained Commerce offers a Core Shop Engine, a backend system that automates delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, all without requiring a payment processor account. This means you can focus on creating and selling your PDF guides without worrying about complex payment systems.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Gumroad and Payhip have strict policies against accepting creators from countries with high-risk factors, such as Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya. This means that even if you have a legitimate business, you might be blocked from using these platforms. Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, uses a payment processor like NOWPayments, which supports 300+ coins and doesn't require KYC or buyer accounts. This makes it possible for creators from restricted countries to sell digital products, including PDF guides.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When you use Gumroad or Payhip, you can expect to pay a commission on each sale, ranging from 3.5% to 8%. This can add up quickly, especially if you're selling low-priced PDF guides. Unchained Commerce charges a one-time fee of $49.99 for the Core Shop Engine, which can be a more cost-effective option in the long run. Plus, with NOWPayments, you can accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies, reducing your costs and increasing your earning potential.
Gumroad blocks creators from high-risk countries, including Nigeria and Ghana.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Gumroad and Payhip require manual setup and management of customer relationships, which can be time-consuming and prone to errors. Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine, on the other hand, automates delivery and payment verification, ensuring that customers receive their PDF guides quickly and efficiently. This means you can focus on creating new content and growing your business, while Unchained Commerce handles the technical details.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a digital creator from a restricted country looking for a PayPal-free zone to sell PDF guides, Unchained Commerce is the clear winner. With its automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, you can focus on creating and selling your digital products without worrying about complex payment systems. Plus, with NOWPayments, you can accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies, reducing your costs and increasing your earning potential.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

Can I use Stripe if I am in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan? Unfortunately, Stripe has a strict policy against accepting creators from high-risk countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. Instead, consider using Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine, which can help you sell digital products, including PDF guides, without requiring a payment processor account.
Unchained Commerce's Core Shop Engine automates delivery and payment verification for a flat fee of $49.99.
